name: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe
details: Bright acidity with notes of jasmine, lemon, and blueberry.

name: Colombian Supremo
details: Balanced body with caramel, almond, and dark chocolate notes.

name: Brazilian Santos
details: Smooth and sweet with hints of hazelnut and toasted bread.

name: Kenyan AA
details: Intense blackcurrant, tomato, and grapefruit acidity.

name: Sumatra Mandheling
details: Full body with herbal, dark chocolate and cedar notes.

name: Guatemala Antigua
details: Chocolatey with hints of smoke and brown sugar.

name: Costa Rica Tarrazu
details: Clean cup with honey, citrus, and subtle floral notes.

name: Italian Espresso Blend
details: Dark roast with rich crema and notes of cocoa and toasted nuts.

name: Jamaican Blue Mountain
details: Rare mild coffee with clean, sweet, and floral characteristics.

name: Mocha Java Blend
details: Classic blend with berry-like acidity and chocolate undertones.

name: Vietnamese Robusta
details: Bold, heavy body with strong bitterness and peanut notes.

name: Panama Geisha
details: Extremely aromatic with jasmine, bergamot and peach notes.

name: Hawaiian Kona
details: Smooth, rich and complex with macadamia nut and caramel flavor.

name: French Vanilla
details: Medium roast with rich vanilla bean aroma and sweet finish.

name: Dark Chocolate Espresso
details: Bold espresso with deep dark chocolate and roasted cocoa notes.

name: Irish Cream
details: Smooth blend with hints of Irish cream and toasted almond.

name: Rwanda Red Bourbon
details: Strawberry, citrus, and caramel with vibrant acidity.

name: Turkish Coffee
details: Finely ground dark roast with traditional Middle Eastern spices.

name: Decaf Colombian
details: Naturally decaffeinated with smooth caramel and nutty flavor.

name: Cinnamon Hazelnut
details: Warm cinnamon with toasted hazelnut and sweet vanilla finish.
